name: omniwa-console
description: Standalone web operations console for the OmniWA GO API.

scripts.build:legacy: VITE_CONSOLE_UI_GENERATION=legacy vite build && VITE_CONSOLE_UI_GENERATION=legacy pnpm artifact:check
scripts.build:v2: VITE_CONSOLE_UI_GENERATION=v2 vite build && VITE_CONSOLE_UI_GENERATION=v2 pnpm artifact:check
scripts.design:check: node scripts/check-table-contract.mjs && node scripts/check-drawer-contract.mjs && node scripts/check-dialog-contract.mjs && node scripts/check-chat-workspace.mjs && node scripts/check-connect-contract.mjs && node scripts/check-overview-contract.mjs && node scripts/check-ui-v2-foundation.mjs && node scripts/check-ui-v2-shell-connect.mjs && node scripts/check-ui-v2-platform-recovery.mjs && node scripts/check-ui-v2-instances.mjs && node scripts/check-ui-v2-conversations.mjs && node scripts/check-ui-v2-groups.mjs && node scripts/check-ui-v2-campaigns-events.mjs
scripts.check: pnpm docs:check && pnpm design:check && pnpm contract:check && pnpm architecture:check && pnpm credential:check && pnpm ci:check && pnpm typecheck && pnpm build && pnpm bundle:check && pnpm artifact:check
